name: Indonesian Chili Peanut Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a pan; add garlic and sauté for 30 seconds.
2. Add peanut butter and stir until blended.
3. Add the rest of the ingredients.
4. Heat, stirring constantly with a whisk, until the sauce is smooth and just beginning to boil.
5. Serve. Variation: Add 1/2 a very ripe, thoroughly mashed banana just before serving.
